data.title: stub-compensate Output
data.description: Output produced by the stub-compensate worker.

compensated.title: Compensated
compensated.description: Always true when the task completes successfully.

correlationId.title: Correlation ID
correlationId.description: The correlationId that was (or had already been) compensated.

alreadyCompensated.title: Already Compensated
alreadyCompensated.description: True if this correlationId had already been compensated in a prior invocation (idempotency guard was hit).

compensatedAt.title: Compensated At
compensatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of this task execution.
